title: znelchar extraction manifest
description: Metadata for extracted znelchar artifacts, produced by Export-ZnelcharContent

sourceFile.description: Absolute path to the source .znelchar file

extractedAtUtc.description: Timestamp of extraction in UTC ISO 8601 format

metadataOnly.description: If true, only metadata was extracted; texture and character data may be absent

characterFile.description: Relative path to extracted character.json (null if metadataOnly=true)

customIcon.description: Optional custom icon metadata if customIconData field was present in _characterData

outputFile.description: Filename of the extracted icon (e.g., customIcon.png)

base64Length.description: Length of the base64-encoded icon data in the original znelchar file

estimatedDecodedBytes.description: Estimated decoded size of the icon file in bytes

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the decoded icon file

mimeType.description: Detected MIME type of the icon image

texturesFolder.description: Relative path to the directory containing texture files

textureName.description: Name of the texture from the znelchar file

outputFile.description: Filename of the extracted texture (may differ from textureName if duplicate names exist)

base64Length.description: Length of the base64-encoded texture data in the original znelchar file

estimatedDecodedBytes.description: Estimated decoded size of the texture file in bytes

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the decoded texture file
